name: Chocolate-Filled Caramel Buns
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Pillsbury Ready to Spread Caramel Pecan Frosting, Supreme
2 (10 oz.) cans Hungry Jack Refrigerated Flaky Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Grease a 9-inch square pan or 9-inch round cake pan.
3. Spread frosting evenly over the bottom of the prepared pan.
4. Press pecans into the frosting.
5. Separate dough into 20 biscuits.
6. Wrap one biscuit around each candy kiss, pinching the edges to seal and completely cover the candy kiss.
7. Arrange the filled biscuits over the frosting and pecans.
8. Bake in the preheated oven for 28-32 minutes or until golden brown. Let stand for 3 minutes.
9. Invert onto a serving plate.
Makes 20 buns.
Per bun: 140 calories, 2 g protein, 18 g carbohydrate, 7 g fat, 0 mg cholesterol, 310 mg sodium
Pillsbury Classic Cookbook #86, 33rd Bake-Off, p.44
